heroMockup.verifiedHint: A key qualification has been verified
heroMockup.requirementsHint: The candidate meets 8 out of 10 requirements
heroMockup.explainSeekerText: This shows the candidate role, qualifications, and the key profile markers derived from their data.
heroMockup.explainFitText: The score rolls profile and role requirements into one headline number; the rows below spell out why.
heroMockup.explainEmployerText: This shows the role and expectations defined by the employer.
heroMockup.explainVerifiedText: A key certificate or qualification is on file and factored into the score.
heroMockup.explainRequirementsText: The bar shows how many listed requirements find clear support in the profile before you go deeper.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.description: Find roles that match your real skills — verifiable competence and clear fit.
jobs.heroTitle: Find work that fits your real skills.
jobs.heroSubtitle: Filter by certificates, qualifications and experience — and see fit clearly, without noise or guesswork.

employers.title: For employers
employers.description: Structured job posts, verifiable competence signals and clear fit before interviews — your employer workspace on Kvalifits.
employers.heroTitle: Hire with confidence — competence is visible.
employers.heroSubtitle: Publish a role where requirements use the same structure as candidate profiles: skills, qualifications and keywords. For each applicant you see what’s present in the profile and how it lines up with your bar — fewer context-free CVs, more signal before the first call.
employers.ctaHint: Creating an account is free. With one login you publish roles, receive applications and review candidates with a fit summary — so you steer interviews toward the right people earlier.
employers.sectionLead: Kvalifits is built for roles where licences, certificates or concrete skills matter — not generic CV prose. You quickly see which applications are grounded in structured profile data, not just polished wording.
employers.sectionBody: Best for teams hiring technical and hands-on roles, specialists and any job where “right” depends on competencies you can compare. Product capabilities grow as we ship.
employers.sectionPractice: Structured, in practice: requirements are captured as lines and skills, not only free text — the same shape feeds fit scoring with the candidate profile. Verifiable means certificates and licences can sit on the profile and are factored into fit scoring; your company still makes the final hire decision.
employers.d1Title: A job post that sets expectations clearly
employers.d1Text: Title, location, work format and employment type are explicit fields; requirements, skills and qualification keywords follow a schema the system uses to score fit against the profile — candidates see quickly whether they’re in range.
employers.d2Title: Competence you can inspect, not only assume
employers.d2Text: Candidates can attach certificates and licences to the profile; those signals feed the fit model. Less storytelling, more checkable facts before you meet.
employers.d3Text: Applications in one place: a fit score plus a short rationale helps you decide whose profile to open first.
employers.p1Title: Your requirements — not vague CV vocabulary
employers.p1Desc: You set skills, requirement lines and qualification tags; they’re compared to profiles in the same structure.
employers.p2Desc: See what aligns with your requirements and where evidence is thin — not a single number without context.
employers.p3Desc: Work is done before the first invite: you spend time with people whose evidence best matches the role.
employers.tutorialSectionIntro: Kvalifits helps you see candidate fit before the first conversation. The system compares your job requirements with the seeker’s profile, skills, experience and other key data to surface the most relevant candidates.
employers.tutorialStep1Title: 1. Publish a job post with clear requirements
employers.tutorialStep1Body: The more precisely you describe the role, skills and expectations, the better the system can compare candidates. A well-filled post gives a more trustworthy fit result.
employers.tutorialStep2Title: 2. The system compares profiles to requirements
employers.tutorialStep2Body: Candidate fit is calculated from the seeker profile and your job post. Factors include job title, skills, experience, location and other important overlaps.
employers.tutorialStep3Title: 3. You see a fit percentage and reasons
employers.tutorialStep3Body: For each applicant you’ll see a fit percentage and a more detailed view that explains what supports the candidate and where to look more closely.
employers.tutorialStep4Title: 4. Compare candidates faster and with more confidence
employers.tutorialStep4Body: Instead of manually filtering a large pile of CVs, you can focus on people whose profiles best match the substance of the role.
employers.tutorialStep5Title: 5. After registering you can get straight to work
employers.tutorialStep5Body: Once registered you can create a company profile, add a job post, manage applicants and see how fit shapes up for that specific role.
employers.tutorialBenefit1: Less time filtering out poor-fit candidates
employers.tutorialBenefit2: A clearer view of candidate fit
employers.tutorialBenefit3: Structured comparison based on job requirements
employers.tutorialCtaSectionText: Create an employer account and start by adding a job post.

seekers.title: For job seekers
seekers.description: Make your skills visible: profile, evidence and a clear fit view on Kvalifits.
seekers.heroTitle: Your skills are valuable — make them visible.
seekers.heroSubtitle: Kvalifits helps you present experience and evidence in a structured way so the right jobs and employers find you faster. One profile, clear competence, less clutter.
seekers.ctaHint: Profile, skills and certificate management plus your fit view will live in the same place — clean and clear. Creating an account is free.
seekers.sectionLead: As a job seeker you want strengths to show and conversations to start with the right roles. Kvalifits aligns your competence with employer requirements.
seekers.sectionBody: Especially if you hold licences, certificates or niche experience — where a CV alone doesn’t tell the full story. The platform grows over time.
seekers.d1Text: Experience, skills and roles in one view — so employers grasp who you are quickly.
seekers.d2Text: Certificates and licences on the profile; less CV games, more facts.
seekers.d3Text: See how well a specific opportunity matches your skills before you invest time.
seekers.p1Desc: Employers see structured proof of what you can do — not just buzzwords.
seekers.p2Desc: Fit and requirements speak the same language; fewer blind applications, smarter choices.
seekers.p3Desc: Verification and feedback help your profile strengthen over time.
seekers.tutorialTitle: Five quick steps before you sign up
seekers.tutorialStep1Body: Fill fields cleanly: skills, preferences, certificates if you have them — it’s your structured pitch to employers.
seekers.tutorialStep2Body: Your profile title, keywords, preferred place and work format directly affect fit for each job.
seekers.tutorialStep3Body: Structured fields: what you do, what’s evidenced, where you fit — not one long CV block.
seekers.tutorialStep4Body: Each application shows how well your profile matches that job’s requirements — before you go deep.
seekers.tutorialStep5Body: Finish your profile, browse roles, apply, and track application fit in one place.

auth.errorEmailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
auth.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email and try again.
auth.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

auth.loginSubtitle: Use one account to manage job posts and your profile.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we’ll send you a reset link.
auth.resetEmailSent: If this email exists in our system, we’ve sent a password reset link.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.accessBlockedSubtitle: Your account access is temporarily restricted.
auth.accessBlockedBody: If you believe this is a mistake, contact support@kvalifits.ee.
auth.alreadySignedIn: You’re already signed in. To create a new account, please log out first.
auth.registerSubtitle: Choose a role and create an account with email and password.
auth.registerSubtitleEmployer: Registering as an employer — your role is pre-selected. Enter your email and password.
auth.registerSubtitleSeeker: Registering as a job seeker — your role is pre-selected. Enter your email and password.
auth.signupNoUser: Sign-up succeeded, but no user was returned.
auth.onboardingSeekerSubtitle: Next you’ll add your profile and certificate info.
auth.onboardingEmployerSubtitle: Next you’ll add your company info and job details.
auth.onboardingNotImplementedYet: Onboarding is in progress. Your role and account records are already created.

onboarding.rlsError: Access denied (security policy). Please try again, or contact us if it persists.
onboarding.seekerProfileStructuredColumnsFixHint: If this error comes from Supabase (a column is missing on seeker_profiles): open SQL Editor and run supabase/scripts/fix-seeker-profiles-structured-fields.sql; wait a few seconds and save again.
onboarding.employerProfileLogoColumnFixHint: If the error mentions logo_url or employer_profiles columns: open SQL Editor and run supabase/migrations/20260428_employer_logo_in_app_only.sql (or supabase/scripts/fix-employer-logo-and-in-app-jobs.sql); wait a few seconds and save again.
onboarding.visibilityHint: If you turn visibility on, employers can discover your profile in the candidates view. If it’s off, your profile stays hidden and won’t appear in discovery.
onboarding.accountHint: To delete your account and data, send a request. For now, deletion requests are handled manually (safer and auditable).
onboarding.deleteAccountEmailBody: Hello! I would like to delete my Kvalifits account and the associated data. Please confirm the process and timeline.
onboarding.avatarFileOnlyHint: Add your photo only as a file (jpg, png, etc.). Pasting a URL is not allowed — the image is uploaded to Kvalifits storage and tied to your account.
onboarding.avatarUpload: Choose an image file from your device
onboarding.avatarUploadInProgress: Your profile photo is still uploading. Please wait until it finishes.
onboarding.avatarRequired: A profile photo is required: upload an image file (not an external link). If you had an old link-based photo, choose a new file.
onboarding.experienceLevelHint: Pick the level that reflects your real working independence. Used in fit scoring.
onboarding.profileTitleHelp: Write the role you’re aiming for. A clear headline helps employers understand your direction fast (e.g. “Electrician”, “Welder”, “Front-end developer”).
onboarding.aboutHint: Write 3–5 sentences: what you do, what you’re strong at, what you’re looking for…
onboarding.aboutHelp: Keep it concrete: experience, strengths, domain, and preferences. This is your short first impression.
onboarding.cvUrlHint: Upload your CV as a PDF file. Pasting a link is not supported here.
onboarding.cvUploadInProgress: CV upload is still in progress. Please wait until it finishes.
onboarding.workAuthorizationHint: e.g. EU citizen, work permit valid until …
onboarding.certificateImageUploadHint: Upload an image or PDF. Alternatively paste a public URL in the field below.
onboarding.errProfileTitleTooShort: Add a clear desired role / title (at least 3 characters).
onboarding.errAboutTooShort: Your about text is too short. Add a concise summary of your experience (at least 40 characters).
onboarding.errPreferredJobTypesRequired: Add at least one preferred employment type (you can add several, comma-separated).
onboarding.errPreferredLocationsRequired: Add at least one preferred location (you can add several, comma-separated).
onboarding.skillsHelp: Add skills you actually use (tools, methods, licences). 5–12 good tags is usually enough.
onboarding.preferredJobTypesHelp: List formats that fit you (e.g. full-time, part-time, contract, shifts).
onboarding.preferredLocationsHelp: Add cities/regions or “Estonia-wide”. If you’re open to remote work, include it in your preferences too.
onboarding.certificateSectionHelp: If you have licences or certificates, add them here. They can improve fit scoring, but they’re not required to save your profile.
onboarding.bCategoryDriversLicense: I have a category B driver’s licence
onboarding.bCategoryDriversLicenseHint: Tick this if you hold a valid B-category licence. It is counted in fit scoring when driving or a B licence is relevant — you do not need to add it again as a separate certificate.
onboarding.certificateNumberOptionalHint: Optional if you prefer not to store the number.
onboarding.certificateUploadInProgress: The certificate image is still uploading. Please wait until it finishes.
onboarding.errContactEmailFormat: Please enter a valid email address.
onboarding.errIndustryRequired: Please add an industry (at least 2 characters).
onboarding.errCompanyDescriptionTooShort: Company description is too short (at least 40 characters).
onboarding.logoUploadError: Logo upload failed. Please try again.
onboarding.logoVisibleOnJobsHint: Your logo appears next to your company name on public job listings and job detail pages.

jobs.missingEmployerProfile: Company profile is missing. Complete employer onboarding first.
jobs.applySubtitle: We’ll email the employer your profile and contact details.
jobs.applyMessagePlaceholder: Write a short note to the employer…
jobs.applyConsent: I agree that by applying, my profile details and contact info (email, phone, CV link) will be shared with this employer.
jobs.applyConsentRequired: You must confirm consent to apply.
jobs.applySuccessBody: We emailed the employer your details.
jobs.applyLoginHint: To apply you must be signed in as a job seeker.
jobs.applyOnlySeekers: Applying is currently available only with a job seeker account.
jobs.seekerNoApplicationsTitle: You don’t have any applications yet.
jobs.seekerNoApplicationsBody: When you apply to jobs, you’ll see them here with their current status. You can also withdraw an application.
jobs.seekerWithdrawConfirm: Withdraw this application? The employer will no longer see you as an active applicant.
jobs.seekerWithdrawPolicyFixHint: Withdrawing failed (security policy). Run Supabase migration `20260424_job_applications_withdraw_policy.sql` or add an UPDATE policy on `job_applications`.
jobs.seekerNextStepHint: Next: wait for updates or review the job post.
jobs.seekerWithdrawnHint: This application has been withdrawn. You can apply again if needed.
jobs.seekerApplicationsPrivacyNote: Note: these details are a snapshot from the time you applied (the version sent to the employer).
jobs.applicantsLegacyScore: Score not stored for this application.
jobs.applicantsSortedHint: Sorted by match score — highest first. Open a row for the full breakdown.
jobs.applicantsClueRequirements: {matched} of {total} requirement lines show evidence in their profile
jobs.applicantsClueCertificates: {matched} of {total} qualification phrases align with their certificates
jobs.applicantsClueLocation: Location and work format look compatible with this post
jobs.applicantsEmptySubtitle: When seekers apply, they appear here with a transparent suitability score so you can compare candidates quickly.
jobs.applicantsIncompleteHint: Limited profile text was on file when they applied — open the detail view for the full snapshot.
jobs.applicantsRankHint: List order by suitability (1 = highest score here)
jobs.applicantHighlight_skillsStrong: Skills and keywords line up strongly with this job post.
jobs.applicantHighlight_skillsPartial: There is meaningful partial overlap between skills/keywords and the post.
jobs.applicantHighlight_requirementsStrong: Profile evidence covers most structured requirement lines.
jobs.applicantHighlight_requirementsPartial: There is partial visible evidence for some requirement lines.
jobs.applicantHighlight_experienceFit: Experience level matches the level stated in the post.
jobs.applicantHighlight_locationFit: Location and work format look compatible with the post.
jobs.applicantHighlight_certificatesSignal: Certificates or qualification wording suggests relevant background.
jobs.applicantHighlight_certificatesStrong: Certificates/qualifications clearly match what the post asks for.
jobs.applicantHighlight_certificateGap: Certificate/qualification expectations in the post are not clearly visible in the profile.
jobs.applicantHighlight_roleAlignment: The profile’s role/title is substantively aligned with this post.
jobs.applyDuplicate: You have already applied to this job.
jobs.applyProfileRequired: Complete your seeker profile before applying.
jobs.applicantMatchExplainFitText: The headline number is a fixed weighted sum (35% skills & keywords + requirement-line evidence, 25% certificates / qualification phrases, 15% experience ladder, 10% role title vs job title, 10% location, 5% work format & employment type). It is deterministic — not AI. Bars show points earned out of each weight. Current score: {scoreLabel}.
jobs.applicantMatchExplainBreakdownText: Each bar is contribution points out of that component’s fixed weight (they sum to the headline percentage, up to rounding).
jobs.applicantMatchExplainBreakdownTextCalm: The score reflects fit between your job post and the applicant snapshot at apply time. Below: supporting indicators, then contributions by axis and structured evidence, and finally factors that made the computed result more conservative.
jobs.applicantMatchLegacyModel: This application was scored with an older model; bars are an approximate remap for display.
jobs.applicantMatchPenaltyHint: The model may lower the headline when data implies hard limits — that is not the same as “reject this candidate”.
jobs.applicantMatchReducingFactorsHint: Model adjustments and caps keep the headline realistic — they are not a verdict on the candidate’s worth.
jobs.applicantMatchFinalScoreHint: For prioritisation: the base sums contributions; the headline includes model adjustments.
jobs.applicantMatchClampedToZero: After adjustments the computed score would have been below zero ({unclamped}p); the UI shows 0%.
jobs.applicantMatchSoftFloorNote: Because the profile still shows partial positive indicators (e.g. experience, location, or light professional overlap), the final score is kept visible. Before that adjustment it was {before}%; the visibility lift added +{added}%.
jobs.applicantMatchPositiveSignalsIntro: These points reflect post–profile overlap and earn base points even when the final headline is more conservative after adjustments.
jobs.applicantMatchReducingReasons: Context: why the result is below the base
jobs.applicantMatchReducingHint: This describes model logic, not a hiring recommendation — use it to guide conversation and follow-up checks.
jobs.applicantMatchPenaltyReasons: Context: why the result is below the base
jobs.applicantMatchPenalty_no_skill_requireme: Overlap in skills and requirement evidence is currently very limited.
jobs.applicantMatchPenalty_weak_skill_require: Overlap in skills and requirement evidence is modest.
jobs.applicantMatchPenalty_role_title_mismatc: Profile focus and title are less aligned with this job post.
jobs.applicantMatchPenalty_missing_required_c: Required certificate/qualification evidence is missing or insufficient.
jobs.applicantMatchPenalty_requirements_misma: There is limited evidence against key requirement lines.
jobs.applicantMatchPenalty_professional_align: Role and skills signals are both limited at the same time — worth clarifying in conversation.
jobs.applicantMatchPenalty_cap_no_skill_overl: Score ceiling: with very limited skills/requirements overlap, the headline stays low.
jobs.applicantMatchPenalty_cap_role_title_mis: Score ceiling: role/title mismatch keeps the maximum more conservative.
jobs.applicantMatchPenalty_cap_missing_requir: Score ceiling: missing required certificate/qualification evidence lowers the maximum.
jobs.applicantMatchPenalty_cap_professional_a: Score ceiling: if role + skills are both limited, the maximum stays lower (not automatically zero).
jobs.applicantMatchWeakAreas: Areas to clarify — confirm in conversation
jobs.applicantMatchAxisCheckpoints: Areas to clarify — confirm in conversation
jobs.applicantDetailDownloadCv: Open CV (PDF) — download from your browser
jobs.applicantDetailCvHint: Opens in a new tab; use the browser menu to save the file.
jobs.applicantDetailNoCv: No CV available — none was stored with this application or the profile has no PDF.
jobs.applicantMatchWeak_skills_keywords: Skills and requirement evidence overlap is partial or limited.
jobs.applicantMatchWeak_certificates: Certificate/qualification phrase alignment is partial or unclear.
jobs.applicantMatchWeak_experience: Experience level is below what the post expects, or missing on one side.
jobs.applicantMatchWeak_location: Location indicators do not align strongly (on-site roles are stricter).
jobs.applicantMatchWeak_work_job_type: Work format or employment type fit is weak versus stated preferences.
jobs.applicantMatchNoSkills: No skills listed on the snapshot.
jobs.applicantMatchNoRequirementLines: No structured requirement lines on this post.
jobs.createSubtitle: Save a draft, choose a package, and test the flow. Payment will be connected later.
jobs.introBody: Fill in the fields below and choose a package. For now, the post is saved as a draft and payments will be added later.
jobs.jobFieldGuideIntro: Each section below has a short hint (how much and in what format). Required fields are marked; the form enforces minimums before publishing.
jobs.jobFieldGuideSummary: One short block (1–2 sentences). Minimum 20 characters. Shown in job listings and search.
jobs.jobFieldGuideDescription: Full job description (tasks, conditions, schedule, etc.). Minimum 40 characters. Blank lines separate paragraphs.
jobs.jobFieldGuideRequirementsExtra: One requirement per line. Minimum 2 lines. Be specific (e.g. licences, experience, environment) — each line is used line-by-line in fit scoring.
jobs.jobFieldGuideSkills: Single line, comma-separated. At least 1 tag (e.g. B licence, AutoCAD). These are the clear “must-have” role tags.
jobs.jobFieldGuideKeywords: Also comma-separated, at least 1 tag. Used for search and fit scoring (e.g. industry, tool, method). May overlap skills, but can include broader search terms.
jobs.jobFieldGuideExperience: Pick the experience level expected for this role (used in fit scoring against the seeker profile).
jobs.jobFieldGuideCert: Optional. Short phrases separated by commas or semicolons (e.g. “Forklift licence, valid B category”). If empty, certificate fit scoring can still use the “Keywords for search…” field.
jobs.jobFieldGuideSalary: Optional. Numbers only (e.g. 2300 and 2800); currency is usually EUR. Leave blank if unknown.
jobs.jobFieldGuideApplication: Applications are only on Kvalifits — candidates submit through the platform.
jobs.jobFieldGuideEditLead: When editing, the same minimums and formats apply — see the hints under each field.
jobs.jobSchemaCacheCertFixHint: If this error comes from Supabase (e.g. a column is missing on job_posts): open SQL Editor and run supabase/scripts/fix-job-posts-certificate-requirements.sql. It adds the columns needed for structured fit scoring and runs NOTIFY pgrst to refresh PostgREST’s schema cache; wait a few seconds and try again.
jobs.jobApplicationTypeEnumFixHint: If this is an application_type enum error (e.g. in_app is not allowed): in SQL Editor run supabase/scripts/fix-job-posts-application-type-enum.sql; wait a few seconds and retry.
jobs.publishHint: The post becomes public immediately and job seekers can apply. Payment will be connected later.
jobs.packageHint: Choose the listing duration. Later we’ll connect payment and expiration logic.
jobs.employerProfileIncomplete: Your company profile is incomplete. Please complete it before creating a job post.
jobs.employerProfileIncompleteBody: To create a job post you need: company name, contact email, location, industry, and a company description (at least 40 characters).
jobs.summaryPlaceholder: 1–2 sentences with the key points of the role.
jobs.applicationKvalifitsOnlyBody: Candidates apply only on this platform — external application links are not used.
jobs.jobRequirementLinesHint: At least 2 lines. Example: Valid B licence · 3+ years on-site experience …
jobs.jobRequirementLinesHelp: Each line becomes a structured requirement for later fit scoring.
jobs.jobCertRequirementsPlaceholder: Comma- or line-separated, e.g. valid B licence; forklift certificate
jobs.errRequirementLines: Add at least two requirements (one per line).
jobs.errRequiredSkills: Add at least one required skill (comma-separated).
jobs.errShortSummary: Short summary is too short (at least 20 characters).
jobs.errDescriptionLength: Job description is too short (at least 40 characters).
jobs.jobMatchingIncomplete: Some required fields for publishing are still incomplete. Check structured requirements, skills, and keywords.
jobs.csvHintJobs: comma-separated, e.g. B licence, AutoCAD, team leadership
jobs.errApplicationUrlInvalid: Application URL must start with http:// or https://
jobs.myJobsSubtitle: View and manage your job posts.
jobs.noJobsYet: You don’t have any job posts yet.
jobs.deleteJobConfirm: Delete the job post "{title}"? This cannot be undone. Related applications will be removed as well.
jobs.title: Job title
jobs.workType: Work format: on-site, hybrid or remote
jobs.jobType: Employment type: full-time, part-time, contract or internship

jobsSearch.quickKeywordsEmpty: No repeating keywords yet — try search or detailed filters.
jobsSearch.quickLocationsEmpty: No locations in listings or formats differ — try search.
jobsSearch.foundCount: {count, plural, one {# listing found} other {# listings found}}
jobsSearch.profileSignalsHint: Skills and profile markers most often added (top {count}). Soon you’ll see suggestions based on your profile too.
jobsSearch.signalFirst: Fit comes from structured data, not gut feel.
jobsSearch.noResults: No listings matched these filters. Try removing one.
